name: greek_basic
_note: Neutral Greek letter table (demonstrative coverage) — each letter references a named cell from cells.json; the math-context 46/456 prefix is composed at config-load time from structures.json.

letters._aliases_note: latex2mathml maps some commands to character variants: \phi → ϕ U+03D5 (not φ U+03C6); \epsilon → ϵ U+03F5 (not ε U+03B5); \theta → ϑ U+03D1 (not θ U+03B8). The 'lower' map below gives both the φ / ϕ codepoints the same cells, so LaTeX output is covered.
